title: An Act to Amend the Provisions of the Maine Workers' Compensation Act of 1992 Governing Requirements for Self-insurers
committee: Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services
last_house_action: 4/22/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/23/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Committee on LABOR suggested and ordered printed On motion by Senator TIPPING of Penobscot REFERENCE to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Report READ and ACCEPTED . READ ONCE Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED . Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.
CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
